nodes.name: Gmail Trigger (labeled)
nodes.notes: Create a Gmail label like 'monday-task', then forward or apply it to any email you want turned into a task.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ (() => { const cols = {}; if ($json.dueDate) cols['date'] = { date: $json.dueDate }; if ($json.priority) cols['priority'] = { label: $json.priority }; const cv = Object.keys(cols).length ? JSON.stringify(JSON.stringify(cols)) : 'null'; return JSON.stringify({ query: `mutation { create_item(board_id: 5093821351, group_id: "new_group29179", item_name: ${JSON.stringify($json.name)}, column_values: ${cv}) { id } }` }); })() }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ query: `mutation { create_update(item_id: ${$json.data.create_item.id}, body: ${JSON.stringify($('Build Task').item.json.notes)}) { id } }` }) }}
